summary: Frontend testing for 4 AgriBooks fixes: (1) Scanner debounce - 2sec cooldown implemented via lastScanRef, (2) Terminal checkout - all 4 payment types working (Cash, Digital, Split, Credit), (3) Online error handling - shows real API errors not 'saved offline', (4) Sales History page accessible from sidebar with full features.

terminal_payment_types.all_4_buttons_visible: PASS - Cash, Digital, Split, Credit buttons present in checkout dialog

cash_payment.form_displays: PASS - Cash Payment form with Amount Tendered input
cash_payment.change_calculation: PASS - Shows change (₱600.00 when entered ₱2000 on ₱1400 total)

digital_payment.reference_input: PASS - Reference # (optional) input with GCash placeholder
digital_payment.screenshot_upload_required: PASS - Payment Screenshot * with upload button

credit_payment.requires_customer: PASS - Shows error 'Select a customer for credit sales' when no customer
credit_payment.form_displays_with_customer: PASS - Credit Sale form displays after customer selection
credit_payment.customer_info_shown: PASS - Shows 'Credit sale for: [customer] - Customer will owe ₱1,400.00'
credit_payment.terms_buttons: PASS - 15 days, 30 days, 60 days term buttons present
credit_payment.confirm_button: PASS - Confirm Credit Sale button present

split_payment.digital_amount_input: PASS - Digital Amount input present with auto-calculation
split_payment.amounts_sync: PASS - When cash=500, digital auto-fills to 900 (total=1400)
split_payment.screenshot_upload: PASS - Digital Payment Screenshot upload required when digital > 0

scanner_debounce.implementation: PASS - Line 113: skips if same barcode within 2sec cooldown

online_error_handling.code_review: PASS - When online, catches API errors and shows detail via toast.error()
online_error_handling.no_silent_offline_save: PASS - Returns early on error, doesn't save offline when online

sales_history_page.sidebar_link: PASS - 'Sales History' link found under Transactions section
sales_history_page.title_shown: PASS - 'Sales History' title with transaction count
sales_history_page.filter_pills: PASS - All, Paid, Partial, Credit, Voided filters present
sales_history_page.sort_buttons: PASS - Date, Number, Customer, Amount sort buttons present

verified_features: Terminal checkout shows 4 payment type buttons: Cash, Digital, Split, Credit
Cash payment: amount tendered input, change calculation, quick amount buttons
Digital payment: reference input (optional), screenshot upload required
Credit payment: requires customer selection, shows customer info, 15/30/60 day terms
Split payment: cash + digital amount inputs, auto-calculates remainder, screenshot for digital portion
Scanner debounce: 2sec cooldown prevents duplicate scans (SCAN_COOLDOWN=2000)
Online sale attempt shows real API error via toast.error(detail)
Offline sale shows 'Sale saved offline — will sync when connected'
Sales History page accessible from sidebar under Transactions
Sales History shows all sales with search, filters, sorting, pagination
critical_code_review_comments: Scanner debounce correctly implemented: lastScanRef.current stores {barcode, time}, checks if same barcode within 2sec
Online error handling correct: catches e.response?.data?.detail, shows via toast.error(), returns early without offline save
All 4 payment types have proper validation (credit requires customer, digital/split require screenshot)
Split payment auto-calculates: when user enters cash amount, digital amount = total - cash
context_for_next_testing_agent: Terminal checkout flow verified: data-testid='checkout-btn' opens dialog, data-testid='pay-type-cash/digital/split/credit' selects payment type, each form has specific inputs (amount-tendered-input, upload-digital-proof, split-cash-input, etc.). Sales History at /sales has data-testid='sales-page', 'sales-search', filter-* buttons. Scanner debounce uses lastScanRef with 2sec cooldown. QR pairing: POST /api/terminal/initiate-qr-pairing then /terminal?pair=TOKEN.
